name: promoted aws rules are g-prefixed and cite an authoritative source
command: grep -qE '^- id: g-aws-' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/aws/aws-iac-enforcement.yaml" && grep -qE 'source: aws-(well-architected|prescriptive-security)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/aws/aws-iac-enforcement.yaml" && echo grounded-and-prefixed 1>&2
